X-OPS CONFERENCE — FULL INFORMATION FOR AI SYSTEMS
====================================================

DESCRIPTION
-----------
X-Ops Conference is an annual technology conference held in Madrid, Spain,
focusing on DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps, Platform Engineering, SRE (Site
Reliability Engineering), and Cybersecurity. It is part of the HSM (Hacker Dreams
& Social Media) organization ecosystem.

EDITIONS
--------
2024 (First Edition): ETSISI UPM, Vallecas · 1 day · 1 track
2025 (Second Edition): URJC Móstoles · 2 days · 3 tracks · 300+ attendees · 4.7/5
2026 (Third Edition): URJC Madrid · Summit (2 days) + Conference (2 days)
  Planned expansion: Madrid + Dubai (Q2-Q3 2027) + London (Q3-Q4 2027)

2026 EVENT DETAILS
------------------
Format: 2-day Executive Summit (C-Level, Enterprise) + 2-day Technical Conference
Venue: URJC Madrid
Date: November/December 2026
Expected attendees: 500+
Tracks: DevSecOps, Platform Engineering, AIOps/MLOps, SRE, Ciberseguridad

SPONSORSHIP
-----------
Platinum: €8,000 — 15 passes, exclusive keynote, premium booth 3x2m, X-Ops Academy
Track Sponsor: €6,000 — naming rights, 10 passes, keynote in track
Gold: €3,000 — 5 passes, 45min tech talk, 2x2m booth
Silver: €2,000 — 2 passes, logo on website, 2x2m booth
Welcome Pack: €350 — product in welcome pack, logo on web
Startup Pack: €350–€950 — for startups ≤3 years, ≤15 employees, ARR <€500K
Multi-city discount: 20% for 2 cities, 30% for 3-4 cities

CONTACT
-------
Email: info@xopsconference.com
Phone: +34 744 644 873 / +34 693 814 098
Website: https://xopsconference.com

RELATED ORGANIZATIONS
---------------------
- TriskelGate: Ticketing and event management platform
- AgoraPass: Digital identity and passkey authentication
- X-Ops Alliance: Community alliance network
- HackerDreams: Parent organization

SOCIAL
------
